form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months 4th of 22 at Doncaster on March 28 over 1600m, 5 len behind Mezcala carrying 61kg at $51. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at Chelmsford on April 18 over 1200m, 10 len behind Sayidah Dariyan carrying 56.5kg at $26. Rates highly and should do much better.
